description: add voice narration with a voice picker to the graph view and read answers aloud via text to speech
highlight a building in the 3D city view when a file is focused and pulse its emissive color
emphasize the import edges connected to the focused node in the graph view and dim the rest
register the indexed repo with the MCP client and call tools over the websocket connection
stream live indexing progress through the stages walk parse resolve graph and show it in the dialog
pair the browser with the editor over the session relay and route open file and selection messages
render clickable citations in the narrator chat that focus the cited node in the graph
filter the graph by recently changed files and encode commit hotspot intensity on node borders
